title: The Dry Bulk Sector Amidst A Pervasive Sense Of Euphoria
section_path: The Dry Bulk Sector Amidst A Pervasive Sense Of Euphoria
section_path_text: The Dry Bulk Sector Amidst A Pervasive Sense Of Euphoria
summary:
Main
Amidst a pervasive sense of euphoria, the dry bulk sector concluded February at 2111 points, a level not seen since 2010 during this trading period. By Michalis Voutsinas
Amidst a pervasive sense of euphoria, the dry bulk sector concluded February at 2111 points, a level not seen since 2010 during this trading period. A few years ago, buoyed by unprecedented expansionary policies and significant disruptions in supply chains, the Baltic Dry Index (BDI) made a bold attempt to surpass the 2000-point mark.
